'''âd-r-f''' ('''darafa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unaward|unaward]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unaward|unaward]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âd-r-f
|-
! Lemma
| darafa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:darafithi|darafithi]] || [[word:darafiji|darafiji]] || [[word:darafishi|darafishi]] || [[word:darafi|darafi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:darafuthuth|darafuthuth]] || [[word:darafujuj|darafujuj]] || [[word:darafushush|darafushush]] || [[word:daraf|daraf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:darafuthu|darafuthu]] || [[word:darafuju|darafuju]] || [[word:darafushu|darafushu]] || [[word:darafu|darafu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:darafufuth|darafufuth]] || [[word:darafufuj|darafufuj]] || [[word:darafufush|darafufush]] || [[word:darafuf|darafuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:darafethe|darafethe]] || [[word:darafeje|darafeje]] || [[word:darafeshe|darafeshe]] || [[word:darafe|darafe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:darafothoth|darafothoth]] || [[word:darafojoj|darafojoj]] || [[word:darafoshosh|darafoshosh]] || [[word:daraf|daraf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:darafotho|darafotho]] || [[word:darafojo|darafojo]] || [[word:darafosho|darafosho]] || [[word:darafo|darafo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:darafofoth|darafofoth]] || [[word:darafofoj|darafofoj]] || [[word:darafofosh|darafofosh]] || [[word:darafof|darafof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:darafĂŠthĂŠ|darafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:darafĂŠjĂŠ|darafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:darafĂŠshĂŠ|darafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:darafĂŠ|darafĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:darafathath|darafathath]] || [[word:darafajaj|darafajaj]] || [[word:darafashash|darafashash]] || [[word:daraf|daraf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:darafatha|darafatha]] || [[word:darafaja|darafaja]] || [[word:darafasha|darafasha]] || [[word:darafa|darafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:darafafath|darafafath]] || [[word:darafafaj|darafafaj]] || [[word:darafafash|darafafash]] || [[word:darafaf|darafaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:darafasha|darafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godarafasha|godarafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidarafasha|gokidarafasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:darafnĂŒsha|darafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godarafnknĂŒsha|godarafnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidarafnĂŒsha|gokidarafnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:darafshĂ«sha|darafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godarafnkshĂ«sha|godarafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidarafshĂ«sha|gokidarafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:darafrosha|darafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godarafnkrosha|godarafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidarafrosha|gokidarafrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:darafmusha|darafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godarafnkmusha|godarafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidarafmusha|gokidarafmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:darafsherasha|darafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godarafnksherasha|godarafnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidarafsherasha|gokidarafsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:darafngasha|darafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godarafnkngasha|godarafnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidarafngasha|gokidarafngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:darafyasha|darafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godarafnkyasha|godarafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidarafyasha|gokidarafyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:darafyamasha|darafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godarafnkyamasha|godarafnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidarafyamasha|gokidarafyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:darafnĂŒshĂ«sha|darafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godarafnknĂŒshĂ«sha|godarafnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidarafnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokidarafnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:darafnĂŒrosha|darafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godarafnknĂŒrosha|godarafnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidarafnĂŒrosha|gokidarafnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:darafnĂŒmusha|darafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godarafnknĂŒmusha|godarafnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidarafnĂŒmusha|gokidarafnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:darafshĂ«nĂŒsha|darafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godarafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|godarafnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidarafshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokidarafshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:darafshĂ«rosha|darafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godarafnkshĂ«rosha|godarafnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidarafshĂ«rosha|gokidarafshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:darafshĂ«musha|darafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godarafnkshĂ«musha|godarafnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidarafshĂ«musha|gokidarafshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:darafronĂŒsha|darafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godarafnkronĂŒsha|godarafnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidarafronĂŒsha|gokidarafronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:darafroshĂ«sha|darafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godarafnkroshĂ«sha|godarafnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidarafroshĂ«sha|gokidarafroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:darafromusha|darafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godarafnkromusha|godarafnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidarafromusha|gokidarafromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:darafmunĂŒsha|darafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godarafnkmunĂŒsha|godarafnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidarafmunĂŒsha|gokidarafmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:darafmushĂ«sha|darafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godarafnkmushĂ«sha|godarafnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidarafmushĂ«sha|gokidarafmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:darafmurosha|darafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godarafnkmurosha|godarafnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidarafmurosha|gokidarafmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:daraf|daraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dĂŠrĂŠf|dĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodaraf|hodaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodĂŠrĂŠf|hodĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodaraf|hohodaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodĂŠrĂŠf|hohodĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒdaraf|nĂŒdaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒdĂŠrĂŠf|nĂŒdĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdaraf|nĂŒnĂŒdaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠrĂŠf|nĂŒnĂŒdĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻdaraf|nĂŻdaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻdĂŠrĂŠf|nĂŻdĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdaraf|nĂŻnĂŻdaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠrĂŠf|nĂŻnĂŻdĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludaraf|ludaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludĂŠrĂŠf|ludĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludaraf|luludaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludĂŠrĂŠf|luludĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidaraf|lidaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidĂŠrĂŠf|lidĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidaraf|lilidaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidĂŠrĂŠf|lilidĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodaraf|kodaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodĂŠrĂŠf|kodĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodaraf|kokodaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodĂŠrĂŠf|kokodĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedaraf|kedaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedĂŠrĂŠf|kedĂŠrĂŠf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedaraf|kekedaraf]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedĂŠrĂŠf|kekedĂŠrĂŠf]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
